executable.title: SimpleThreshold_sramtilak
executable.acknowledgements: ITK BinaryThresholdImageFilter. ITK Software Guide Figure 6.1.

parameters.label: Input/Output
parameters.description: Input and output volume file paths

image.name: outputVolume
image.label: Output Volume
image.description: Thresholded 3D output image written in NIFTI format.

parameters.label: Thresholding Parameters
parameters.description: Define the intensity window and replacement values for inside/outside pixels

double.name: lowThreshold
double.label: Low Threshold
double.description: Lower bound of the threshold window. Pixels with intensity >= lowThreshold and <= highThreshold are classified as inside.

double.name: highThreshold
double.label: High Threshold
double.description: Upper bound of the threshold window. Must be greater than lowThreshold.

double.name: outsideValue
double.label: Outside Value
double.description: Pixel intensity assigned to voxels whose original value falls outside [lowThreshold, highThreshold].

double.name: insideValue
double.label: Inside Value
double.description: Pixel intensity assigned to voxels whose original value falls within [lowThreshold, highThreshold].
